race.description: Grafton Hire Super Mdn Showcase Hcp
race.comment: I AM STEFFI (8) resumes today with just the one placing from five starts. Failed to come up last prep with a tiring sixth over 1000m at the Sapphire Coast last December. Gets in light with the 3kg claim and finds a winnable contest. DIDIE'S MEADOW (3) Maurice filly who resumes. Showed ability in her two starts in the first prep and looks to have strengthened up with the two sharp trials. Gets her chance with Nash Rawiller engaged. MISS DIPSEY (6) turned in a much better run at her second race start with a game on-pace second over 1250m at Ballina. Will appreciate the firmer track with Spokes' 2kg claim. IBETTY (10) Brutal filly out of Xplosion on debut for the Pat Randall yard. Given the two trials and look for a better showing under race conditions with the winkers on.
